description: This file contains SCSS mixins and functions for implementing Responsive Font Sizes (RFS), enabling scalable and responsive design for font sizes, paddings, margins, and other properties based on viewport dimensions.

methods.name: divide
methods.description: Performs division with precision control, handling units and sign, used internally for calculations.

methods.name: rfs-value
methods.description: Calculates the non-responsive value for a given set of size values, used in the rfs mixin.

methods.name: rfs-fluid-value
methods.description: Calculates the fluid (responsive) value for a set of size values, used in the rfs mixin.
